titleStmt.title: SII 24.200: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 200. (A.R. No. 43 of 1948-49.) SAME WALL, BY THE SIDE OF No. 44.

summary.p: Much damaged. Seems to record a provision made for conducting certain festivals in the Perumāḷdēvaṉ-tirumaṇḍapam to god Lakshmī-Varāhanāyaṉār and the goddess Nāchchiyār instituted by Kulaśēkhara-Kāliṅgarāyar of Aricharaṇālaya-nallūr. The record is dated in the 8th year of Jaṭāvarmaṉ who bears the epithet Emmaṇḍala[muṅkoṇḍaruḷiya]. The king may be identified with Jaṭāvarmaṉ Sundara-Pāṇḍya I.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koccaṭapaṉmarāna tiripuvanacakravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭa ṇṭiya tevarkku yāṇṭu 8 varuṣam
raṅkaṉ tiruppatiyil perumāḷ tevaṉ tirumaṇṭapattil pāṇṭimaṇ caraṇālayanallūrtey
kulacekarakkāliṅkarāyar Ēṟi Aruḷappaṇṇiṉa lakṣmīvarākapperumāḷukkum nācci veṇṭum titta
toṟum Ittirumaṇṭapattil Ēḻāntirunāḷil Ēṟiyaruḷi Amutuceyyum ciṟappuk kum Amutu Ulakuṭaiya nāyaṉār cra
varāka nāyaṉārkkum nācciyārkkum Amutupaṭikku tiruvaraṅka tevaṉāl ti 1 kku 10 nācciyārum Ēṟi Aruḷi Amutu cey
ṉa viḻupparayaṉ Eḻuttiṭṭa Uṭaṟkoṭpaṭi periya tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa Aṉaittu ḻum
ṇṭu pūtāṉa mutalukku kūṭṭikkoṇṭa kārmaṟuviṭṭa rūpāy maṅkalattil kārmaṟu rūpāy 2 ṉā Ā ṇṭu Uṭaṟkoṭpaṭi mutal vaittu A
mutupaṭikku nāḷ 1— kku tiruvaraṅkatevaṉāl n=ticam tirunāṭa tiruvaraṅka tevaṉāl n=ticam paruppu ciṟappāka veṇṭum veñcaṉamum tirumaṭaippaḷḷiyil Eṭuttup potukiṟapaṭikku pallavaṉ viḻupparayaṉ Eḻuttiṭṭa
Uṭaṟkoṭpaṭikku kalveṭṭu Ittiruviṭaiyāṭṭattukku Iraṇṭum pallavaṉ viḻupparaiyan vacam prasātittu śrīpaṇṭārattil Oṭukkittu
Digital edition of SII 24.200 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
